findings.assessment_draft: Biopsy-confirmed low rectal adenocarcinoma, pMMR, MRI cT3N1M0, ECOG 1.

node_output.assessment_draft: Biopsy-confirmed low rectal adenocarcinoma, pMMR, MRI cT3N1M0, ECOG 1.

decision_json.summary: Stage III low rectal adenocarcinoma, pMMR, cT3N1M0.

treatment_plan.step: Discuss total neoadjuvant therapy in multidisciplinary tumor board.
treatment_plan.rationale: cT3N1 low rectal cancer generally requires neoadjuvant treatment before surgery.

treatment_plan.step: Plan long-course chemoradiation or short-course radiation followed by systemic chemotherapy.
treatment_plan.rationale: Treatment sequence should be individualized by MRI risk features and patient preference.

treatment_plan.step: Restage and consider TME surgery after neoadjuvant therapy.
treatment_plan.rationale: Surgical timing depends on response and resectability.

node_output.final_response:
> [!WARNING]
> HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED: Critic verdict REJECTED. No direct guideline citations are bound; this recommendation requires manual oncology review.

Recommendation retained for review: For biopsy-confirmed pMMR cT3N1M0 low rectal adenocarcinoma, discuss total neoadjuvant therapy in an MDT setting, then restage before TME surgery. The sequence can include chemoradiation/radiation plus systemic chemotherapy, individualized by MRI risk features and patient preference.

> [!WARNING]
> HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED: Critic verdict REJECTED. No direct guideline citations are bound; this recommendation requires manual oncology review.

Recommendation retained for review: For biopsy-confirmed pMMR cT3N1M0 low rectal adenocarcinoma, discuss total neoadjuvant therapy in an MDT setting, then restage before TME surgery. The sequence can include chemoradiation/radiation plus systemic chemotherapy, individualized by MRI risk features and patient preference.
